LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [t].[AssigneeId] = [a].[Id]
WHERE [t].[AssigneeId] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[DueDate] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[DueDate] > @__now_0 AND [t].[DueDate] <= @__AddHours_1 AND [t].[Status] <> N'Completed'
